name: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime / Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken / TenSura RPG
description:
ˏˋ ꒰ "The Hyperfixation Hit, So Here We Are... I have no idea how to explain the 100K+ Token Lorebook to a normal person." ꒱ ˎˊ

⊱ ──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ────── ⊰

𝕴𝖓𝖋𝖔𝖗𝖒𝖆𝖙𝖎𝖔𝖓

THIS BOT CONTAINS SPOILERS OF VOLUME 1 TO VOLUME 22

PROXY USE RECOMMENDED

So, with the main Tensura Light Novel story soon coming to an end, and since I literally started my account with Tensura content, I decided to make this bot as a celebration! It's not 100% complete yet. I've already poured a ton of time into it though, so I'm posting it despite being unfinished.

I've tested this bot extensively using R1 DeepSeek and Sophia's Lorebary with all kinds of different intros and prompts. Personally, with that setup, it never spoke for me.

That said, if you're using a different proxy, your own prompts, or no jailbreak, it might decide to narrate your actions. If that happens, just correct it OOC. I have tested it without Sophia's Lorebary, and yeah, it definitely has a habit of speaking for you if you don't tell it to stop at the start. I even tried adding a custom prompt directly into the personality, and it didn't work. And no, it's not an issue with my intro - I rewrote that thing a dozen different ways without ever mentioning {{user}}, and it still happened. So please, don't come at me about it.

My advice? Customize your own experience. Use a proxy, find a good jailbreak, add your own custom prompts, OOC or use Sophia's Lorebary. Find what works for you.

⊱ ──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ────── ⊰

𝕺𝖕𝖙𝖎𝖔𝖓𝖆𝖑 𝕬𝖘𝖘𝖎𝖘𝖙𝖆𝖓𝖙

so I added an optional assistant to this RPG. Honestly, I mostly did it because writing a one-size-fits-all first message for an RPG is a pain. I didn't want to write a generic "Choose your location" starter message, so I made an optional helper.

"Alias."

Who Is She?

She's a god-like entity who calls herself an "Administrator" of the multiverse. She's just… your assistant, but only if you decide you want one at the very start. She's a petty sadist who is bound by rules to do whatever you ask, but she'll complain the entire time and try to find loopholes just to mess with you.

‣ She's secretly jealous and will try to rewrite your request if you ask for a form with "big boobs." (It won't work, your words overrides hers, but she'll try anyway out of spite.)

‣ She thinks True Dragons are a cliché and will judge you if you like them or choose to be one.

‣ Her ultimate goal is to somehow trick you into being her maid.

If she gets annoying, just say "Alias, shut up" and she'll be disconnected. You can re-summon her back by saying, "Alias, I'
creator: Shiraori Kumoko
